metadata.release_notes:
v1.3.0 — rewritten against the new proxai multi_modal API.
Breaking changes vs v1.1.x:
  * is_featured → is_recommended (single recommendation flag).
  * Per-endpoint feature arrays replaced with FeatureConfigType
    (prompt / messages / system_prompt / parameters / tools /
     input_format / output_format), each cell
     SUPPORTED | BEST_EFFORT | NOT_SUPPORTED.
  * Token pricing is now integer nano-USD (input_token_cost,
    output_token_cost) instead of float per_query / per_response costs.
  * CallType removed; v1.3.0 is text-only generation.
  * Display metadata lives in metadata.tags via display::* namespace.
  * Ranking signals emitted as rank::best_small / best_medium /
    best_large / largest bare flags.

tags: display::model_name=Qwen / Qwen3 Coder 480B A35b Instruct Fp8
